name: The Pocket Tin
description: Our signature starter — four hand-selected, fish-tested patterns in a slim pocket tin. Built for your vest, your sling pack, or your back pocket. Every fly in this tin has been chosen because it catches fish, period.
details: Each Pocket Tin ships with 4 hand-tied flies selected for versatility. Patterns rotate seasonally so you're always fishing what's working. The tin itself is a rugged, slim-profile aluminum case that fits anywhere.

name: Arrowhead Sticker
description: Premium die-cut vinyl sticker. Waterproof, UV-resistant, and built to last on your truck, cooler, fly box, or water bottle. 3" x 3".
details: High-quality, outdoor-grade vinyl with a matte laminate finish. Designed to handle rain, sun, and years on the water.
